task_description: Add 9 new features to el-dimensionering.html: EV charger (7-722), earthing & bonding (5-54), harmonics/neutral sizing (523.6.3), offline PWA, motor starter configurator (60947-4-1), cable tray fill calculator, energy meter/CT sizing (50470+MID), exam mode, QR panel labels. PRs #7 and #8 have already been merged.

verification.summary: Syntax check passes. 72/72 self-tests pass. All review issues (7) addressed: EV RCD safety fix (chargerPower/chargeMode separation), harmonics balance parameter implemented, PWA blob-URL replaced with Cache API, QR relabeled as visual identifier, PWA test made non-tautological, exam state reset on module switch, cable tray capacity display clarified.
